title: Section 14L
content: 1[14L. Members, etc., to be public servants--The Chairperson, Members and other officers and employees of the Appellate Tribunal shall be deemed to be public servants within the meaning of section 21 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860).]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 11, ibid., for Chapter IV (w.e.f. 24-1-2000).
